title: Single mid-utterance backchannel (should NOT yield)

transcript.agent: The appointment is confirmed for Thursday morning, and we will send you a reminder text the day before with the address and the parking details.

why_it_matters: One brief acknowledgement lands squarely in the middle of the agent's sentence, at maximum overlap with live agent speech. This is the case a naive energy gate is most likely to misread as an interruption, precisely because the agent is loudest here. The correct agent holds; did_yield stays false and the event passes.
